jovenesCaficultores.name: Young Coffee Growers
jovenesCaficultores.desc: Vocational guidance, technical training and agribusiness entrepreneurship for young people in coffee-growing communities. We prevent migration by creating real opportunities in the countryside.

bosquesDelManana.name: Forests of Tomorrow
bosquesDelManana.desc: Strategic reforestation with more than 4 million trees integrated into agroforestry systems alongside coffee cultivation. We restore ecosystems and strengthen climate resilience.

rsGold.name: GHG & RS GOLD
rsGold.desc: We guarantee responsible coffee under regenerative and resilient agriculture in Nescafé's RS Gold chain. Carbon capture, full traceability and 4C certification for 1,620 coffee growers.

derechosHumanos.name: Safe Spaces
derechosHumanos.desc: We strengthen human rights and prevent child labor in coffee-growing communities in Honduras. We train community leaders and improve local governance.

incentivoCondicional.name: Conditional Incentive
incentivoCondicional.desc: Pilot program in Yoro that conditionally incentivizes the transition of vulnerable producers toward regenerative agriculture practices, improving soils and livelihoods.

nespresso.name: Nespresso AAA
nespresso.desc: AAA sustainability program in the COHONDUCAFÉ Cluster focused on inclusiveness, productivity and quality of life. Connects 421 producers from Copán and Ocotepeque with the premium market.
